evals.prompt: I pushed my branch and the CI is failing. The GitHub Actions workflow `ci.yml` shows errors. Can you help me fix it?
evals.expected_output: Agent reads gh-fix-ci/SKILL.md, runs inspect_pr_checks.py to get structured failure data, summarizes failures, proposes a fix plan, and waits for approval before implementing.
expectations: The agent references agents/gh-fix-ci/SKILL.md or follows its workflow
The agent attempts to run or references inspect_pr_checks.py with the correct path (agents/gh-fix-ci/scripts/)
The agent does NOT reference <path-to-skill> or ${CLAUDE_SKILL_ROOT} placeholders
The agent proposes a fix plan before implementing changes
The agent does NOT require sandbox_permissions or require_escalated

evals.prompt: There are some review comments on my PR that I need to address. Can you help?
evals.expected_output: Agent reads gh-address-comments/SKILL.md, runs fetch_comments.py to get PR comments, numbers them with summaries, and asks which to address before making changes.
expectations: The agent references agents/gh-address-comments/SKILL.md or follows its workflow
The agent attempts to run or references fetch_comments.py with the correct path (agents/gh-address-comments/scripts/)
The agent numbers the review threads and asks the user which to address
The agent does NOT auto-fix all comments without asking

evals.prompt: I need you to iterate on my PR until CI is green and all review feedback is addressed.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads iterate-pr/SKILL.md, identifies the PR, requests Copilot review, polls for completion, gathers and categorizes feedback by LOGAF priority, auto-fixes high/medium, prompts for low, checks CI, and loops until everything passes.
expectations: The agent references agents/iterate-pr/SKILL.md or follows its workflow
The agent runs or references fetch_pr_checks.py and fetch_pr_feedback.py with correct paths (agents/iterate-pr/scripts/)
The agent requests a Copilot review via gh copilot-review
The agent polls for the Copilot review to complete before proceeding
The agent categorizes feedback as high/medium/low following LOGAF scale
The agent auto-fixes high and medium items without prompting
The agent presents low-priority items as a numbered list for user selection
The agent does NOT use uv run or ${CLAUDE_SKILL_ROOT} in script paths
The agent does NOT reference reply_to_thread.py
The agent uses gh api graphql for replying to review threads

evals.prompt: Run the setup script to install PR automation agents into my project.
evals.expected_output: The setup script downloads upstream skills, applies modifications (path fixes, sandbox removal, Copilot additions), copies Claude commands and Copilot config files.
expectations: The setup script downloads from ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills for gh-address-comments and gh-fix-ci
The setup script downloads from getsentry/skills for iterate-pr
The setup script patches SKILL.md files with portable paths
The setup script copies .claude/commands/ files
The setup script copies .github/copilot-reviews.yml and .github/copilot-instructions.md
The setup script does NOT overwrite existing files (skip-if-exists behavior)

evals.prompt: Verify that the copilot-instructions.md properly configures LOGAF tagging for the iterate-pr feedback categorization.
evals.expected_output: The copilot-instructions.md instructs Copilot to prefix all review comments with h:, m:, or l: tags matching the LOGAF patterns that fetch_pr_feedback.py parses.
expectations: copilot-instructions.md defines h: tag for high priority (must address)
copilot-instructions.md defines m: tag for medium priority (should address)
copilot-instructions.md defines l: tag for low priority (optional/nit)
The tag format matches what fetch_pr_feedback.py parses (h:, m:, l: at start of comment)
copilot-instructions.md instructs that every review comment must start with a tag
